---
id: sync-playlist
title: "Sync playlist"
description: "Triggers an immediate sync of the playlist to Navidrome. Returns an HTML fragment with sync progress."
sidebar_label: "Sync playlist"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Sync playlist"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/playlists/{id}/sync"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers an immediate sync of the playlist to Navidrome. Returns an HTML fragment with sync progress.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
